samples.xml_description:
<module id="signal_generator">
    <description>Implement a Triangle Wave signal generator module that generates a waveform by incrementing and decrementing a 5-bit signal named "wave". The waveform cycles between 0 and 31, which is incremented or decremented by 1.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal used for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal. Defined as 0 for reset and 1 for reset signal inactive.</input>
        <output id="wave" width_description="[4:0]">5-bit output waveform signal representing the generated waveform.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="state_0">0</parameter>
        <parameter id="state_1">1</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg id="state" type="internal" width_description="[4:0]">State register for controlling the state of the waveform generation.</reg>
            <reg id="wave" type="output" width_description="[4:0]">Waveform register representing the generated waveform.</reg>
            <always>
                <sensitivity>posedge clk or negedge rst_n</sensitivity>
                <if>
                    <condition>~rst_n</condition>
                    <true>
                        <assign id="state" value="0"/> 
                        <assign id="wave" value="0"/> 
                    </true>
                    <false>
                        <case>
                            <case_item id="state_0">
                                <if>
                                    <condition>~wave == 31</condition>
                                    <true>
                                        <assign id="state" value="state_1"/> 
                                    </true>
                                    <false>
                                        <assign id="wave" value="wave + 1"/> 
                                    </false>
                                </if>
                            </case_item>
                            <case_item id="state_1">
                                <if>
                                    <condition>~wave == 0</condition>
                                    <true>
                                        <assign id="state" value="state_0"/> 
                                    </true>
                                    <false>
                                        <assign id="wave" value="wave - 1"/> 
                                    </false>
                                </if>
                            </case_item>
                        </case>
                    </false>
                </always>
            </internal>
        </sequential_logic>
    </implementation>
</module>
